content: Phase 1: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 1: Install animation/sound dependencies (framer-motion, canvas-confetti, howler)
Phase 1: Build Vault/Seal SVG component with state machine (Pending→Active→Released/Failed)
Phase 1: Implement audio cues (pledge-in, seal-lock, release) with mute toggle
Phase 1: Screenshot and validate vault animations on mobile viewport
Phase 2: Backend — FastAPI models, endpoints, seed data
Phase 2: Frontend — Landing/Role picker, Explore feed, Create Bond wizard
Phase 2: Frontend — Bond Dashboard, Join flow, Proof submission, Release screen, Share
Phase 2: Wire full end-to-end loop with seeded bonds + new bond creation
Phase 3: End-to-end testing with testing_agent_v3, fix issues
